hero.title: Haluqaffi tamainni uqauhini
hero.lede: Una makpirnia numiktiqtauhimayuq Resource Translator inmikkut, tamainni naqitaraangat pilluagakhamut, tamainut uqauhirnut Azure AI Translator ikayuqtainut.

features.configurable: Nipait, havagvikyuat, naunaitkutit, uqamaluktut — tamaita ihuaqhaqtaaqtut.
